strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior roles, including Optilyz and RIDE Capital.
Direct, hands-on experience with AI agent development and Model Context Protocol (MCP) infrastructure at re:cinq.
Exceptional background in software testing and craftsmanship, evidenced by teaching TDD courses and authoring the Fluent-Asserts testing library.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are specifically requested in the primary stack.
Missing Kotlin and Python experience, though the candidate does have Java proficiency to cover the secondary technology requirement.
Relatively short tenures (1.5 to 3 years) in several recent roles, which might warrant discussion regarding long-term retention.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly qualified candidate who strongly aligns with the core competencies of this Senior Fullstack Developer role. His resume demonstrates deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) from his time at Optilyz and GISCollective. Crucially, he meets the niche requirement for AI agent development through his current work building MCP generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq. Furthermore, his strong engineering fundamentals are proven by his creation of testing libraries like Fluent-Asserts and his history of teaching TDD. While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Kotlin, his extensive Node.js background and Java experience make these minor gaps easily surmountable, resulting in a very high overall fit.
